methods.description: A space-for-time substitution approach was used to study the stages of dune stabilization by selecting three sites representing mobile, semi-fixed, and fixed dunes. The experiments were conducted using a randomized split-plot design to assess the impact of natural restoration on soil and vegetation.

steps.description: Select 3 sites representing three main stages of dune stabilization (mobile dunes, semi-fixed dunes, and fixed dunes) near the Naiman Desertification Research Station.
steps.searchable_summary: select study sites for dune stabilization stages

steps.description: Conduct experiments using a randomized split-plot design with four replications.
steps.searchable_summary: apply randomized split-plot design for experiments

steps.description: Measure soil properties and perform a vegetation survey to assess changes in soil nutrients and plant species richness.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze soil properties and vegetation survey data

methods.description: Observations were conducted to identify bee species and record flower-visiting rates of bee pollinators to C. microphylla flowers across different dune populations.

steps.description: Identify bee species and record flower-visiting rates of bee pollinators from mobile to fixed dune populations in 2014 and 2015.
Estimate pollinator visitation rates by observing 6 plants for 20-minute intervals and recording the number of flower visits by bee pollinators.
Calculate bee species richness and pollinator assemblage based on collected specimens.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate bee species richness and assemblage

methods.description: A pollen supplementation experiment was conducted to estimate variation in pollen limitation during vegetation restoration by comparing natural and supplemented pollination treatments.

steps.description: Randomly select 7-21 shrubs at each site in May for pollination treatments.
Conduct two pollination treatments: natural pollination and pollen supplementation.
Count the number of experimental flowers that produced fruits and calculate the fruit set and mean number of seeds per fruit.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate fruit set and seed count

steps.description: Calculate the pollen limitation index (PL) for each plant and the population.
